## What this changes

Briefly, what and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes
- [ ] Added/updated a test for the change
- [ ] Added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] If I touched the rule registry: ran `python tools/gen_coverage.py` (COVERAGE.md)
- [ ] If I added a rule: added a matching authoring pattern in `patterns.py`
- [ ] No reproduced standard text — knowledge-base entries are original paraphrase
- [ ] I did not weaken a design invariant (fingerprints, verification gate, loop
      termination — see CONTRIBUTING.md)
